tools.name: get_cost_seg_quote
tools.description: Quote a CPA-ready cost segregation study for a US real estate property. Returns the study cost in USD, estimated Year-1 accelerated depreciation, and (when a tax bracket is provided) Year-1 tax savings and ROI on the study fee. Pure tier-matrix lookup — no engine run, no charge to the buyer, safe to

tools.name: get_cost_seg_payment_link
tools.description: Generate a Stripe Checkout URL for a human buyer to purchase a Cost Seg Smart cost segregation study.
